scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix Frontend/Auth install && npm --prefix Frontend/Billing install && npm --prefix Frontend/Invoice install
scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if($c){ try{ Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }catch{} }; tsx watch server.ts"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,auth,billing,invoice -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:billing" "npm run dev:invoice"
